Here, your position and how you are showing up comes forward most clearly, and the reading suggests that your role and boundaries set the tone.
A house overlay often reveals where the reading must be worked with directly.
The pair turns symbol into movement.

weakSummaryLines.line: Overall, the pattern answers steady adjustment more readily than dramatic correction.
The strongest signal usually sits in the pattern, not the loudest symbol.
